named.name: thejad_status
named.desc: ThejaD status: capability %, unlock state, repo detection, thanks footer.

named.name: thejad_unlock
named.desc: Unlock maximum (phrase mamaThejana) — stays until lock phrase "nothejad unlock". Same tool locks when given nothejad unlock.

named.name: coordination_claim
named.desc: Claim a path/lane so Cursor + Antigravity + Copilot do not collide. Writes coordination/active-claims.json.

named.name: coordination_release
named.desc: Release an active coordination claim by id.

named.name: memory_store
named.desc: Store a key/value in ThejaD local memory (.thejad/memory.json).

named.name: memory_search
named.desc: Search ThejaD memory keys/values (substring).

named.name: story_lookup
named.desc: Lookup LOLCDL user story by id or route (from stories-traceability.json).

named.name: limits_check
named.desc: Return LOLC dev payment limits and programme phase weights.

named.name: scope_guard
named.desc: Check task text against Phase 1-only programme scope (AGENTS.md aligned).

named.name: smoke_hint
named.desc: Suggest npm smoke commands for a feature area.

named.name: diary_append
named.desc: Append daily development diary entry (ThejaD diary log).

named.name: swarm_plan
named.desc: Generate multi-agent task plan for UI + BFF + service lanes.

named.name: ollama_prompt
named.desc: Send prompt to local Ollama (mock if unavailable).

named.name: notebooklm_ask
named.desc: NotebookLM bridge (notebooklm-py). Mock: returns repo doc pointers until R2 in requested.md.

named.name: figma_context
named.desc: Figma/Stitch context — route map + UI plan paths (mock until R1).

named.name: full_stack_map
named.desc: Map route → page → BFF → microservice (backend + UI plan).

named.name: antigravity_handoff
named.desc: Format Antigravity ↔ Cursor handoff block for MULTI_AGENT_DEVELOPMENT_LOG.

named.name: team_list
named.desc: List supreme engineering team roles (50+ yrs collective).

named.name: team_consult
named.desc: Consult Lahiru/Geesara/Sachini/Thejana/Security/Backend.

named.name: thejana_supreme_plan
named.desc: Supreme Developer end-to-end delivery plan.

named.name: lahiru_ui_review
named.desc: UI/UX review for route (Lahiru).

named.name: sachini_story_draft
named.desc: Draft LOLCDL user story skeleton (Sachini).

named.name: geesara_qa_plan
named.desc: QA test plan for story (Geesara).

named.name: security_white_hat_scan
named.desc: White-hat security doc index + dev flag checklist.

named.name: device_search
named.desc: Search full device index (C: user + E: projects).

named.name: device_usable_summary
named.desc: Summarize usable device assets: MCP configs, skills, FusionX/banking paths, Ollama models.

named.name: device_usable_search
named.desc: Search categorized device assets (mcpConfigs, skills, fusionxOrBanking, docker, postman, …).

named.name: device_reindex
named.desc: Rebuild device-index.json + device-usable.json from entire dev device scan.

named.name: swarm_init
named.desc: Initialize ThejaD swarm (Ruflo-class).

named.name: swarm_status
named.desc: Swarm status.

named.name: agent_spawn
named.desc: Spawn tracked agent in swarm.

named.name: worker_hints
named.desc: Background worker + Ruflo daemon hints.

named.name: notebooklm_install
named.desc: notebooklm-py install commands.

named.name: notebooklm_add_sources
named.desc: Add LOLC repo docs as NotebookLM sources.

named.name: geesara_run_smokes
named.desc: Run smoke suite (full capacity) or hints at 80%.

named.name: engineering_team_roster
named.desc: Full engineering team: Thejana, Lahiru, Geesara, Sachini + Security + Backend with lanes and plugins.

named.name: plugins_status
named.desc: Status of superpowers, security-review, claude-mem vendors and Claude plugin install commands.

named.name: plugins_install_hints
named.desc: Install steps for engineering plugin bundle (PowerShell + Claude Code commands).

named.name: vendors_status
named.desc: All vendor repos (graphify, superpowers, claude-mem, security-review, notebooklm) install status.

named.name: vendor_sync_skills
named.desc: Sync vendor SKILL.md files into thejad/skills/imported for Cursor.

named.name: graphify_hint
named.desc: Graphify install + index LOLC monorepo as knowledge graph.

named.name: thejad_pod_init
named.desc: Create ThejaD team pod (LAN shared memory + peer Ollama). Hyperspace-class vision for same network.

named.name: thejad_pod_status
named.desc: Team pod status: peers, Hyperspace gateway, shared memory paths.

named.name: thejad_pod_peer_add
named.desc: Add LAN peer sync URL (http://IP:19090) — shares memory + Ollama on that host.

named.name: thejad_pod_models
named.desc: List all models: local Ollama + LAN peers + Hyperspace pod gateway.

named.name: thejad_pod_memory_store
named.desc: Store in team shared memory (synced across LAN pod members).

named.name: thejad_pod_memory_search
named.desc: Search team shared memory.

named.name: thejad_pod_memory_sync
named.desc: Pull and merge shared memory from all pod peers (newest wins).

named.name: thejad_pod_discover_lan
named.desc: UDP LAN discovery — find other ThejaD pods (requires pod serve on peers).

named.name: thejad_pod_bootstrap
named.desc: Zero-touch bootstrap: init pod → LAN auto-join → manifest → memory sync → setup. Run on every device once.

named.name: hyperspace_pod_status
named.desc: Hyperspace pods.hyper.space CLI + gateway status (full pod stack).

named.name: hyperspace_gateway_infer
named.desc: Inference via Hyperspace pod gateway (OpenAI-compatible, distributed mesh).

named.name: thejad_agent_manifest_export
named.desc: Export agent parity manifest so every user runs same orchestra/rules/skills level.

named.name: thejad_agent_manifest_apply
named.desc: Apply team agent manifest + verify Cursor rule/skill/hooks exist.

named.name: thejad_finalize
named.desc: Run 100% readiness check: setup, hooks, Ollama, optional Figma/NotebookLM; auto-completes setup when required checks pass.

named.name: thejad_setup_status
named.desc: First-run setup: list required APIs/logins (Ollama, repo, optional OpenAI/NotebookLM/Figma). No secrets stored.

named.name: thejad_setup_complete
named.desc: Mark setup items acknowledged and flag setup complete after user provided APIs/logins (env vars only).

named.name: thejad_models_start
named.desc: Start/warm all offline (Ollama) and enumerate online models before orchestration.

named.name: notebooklm_auth_status
named.desc: Check NotebookLM CLI authentication (notebooklm auth check).

named.name: thejad_orchestrate
named.desc: Main orchestra: after setup, warm models → match role/skills/agent → token-optimized prompt → LOLC delivery workflow. Call on every user task.

prompts.name: team_backend_consult

prompts.name: team_security_consult

prompts.name: geesara_qa_regression
prompts.desc: QA regression pack for LOLCDL story

prompts.name: fusionx_ui_wave
prompts.desc: FusionX UI wave implementation from SCREEN_ROUTE_MAP

prompts.name: fusionx_architecture
prompts.desc: Full-stack architecture path (web BFF + Nest services + Kong)

prompts.name: fusionx_qa_way
prompts.desc: QA way: Geesara smokes + regression pack

prompts.name: phase1_only_guard
prompts.desc: Refuse P2-P5 scope creep; Phase 1 spine only

prompts.name: multi_agent_speed
prompts.desc: Parallel lanes A/B/C with claims + smoke gates

prompts.name: security_hardening_dev
prompts.desc: Security hardening with local dev mocks

prompts.name: thejad_orchestra_master
prompts.desc: Every user prompt → thejad_orchestrate (models + role + token prompt)

prompts.name: graphify_index_lolc
prompts.desc: Build Graphify knowledge graph for LOLC monorepo

prompts.name: frontend_design_screen
prompts.desc: Official frontend-design plugin for FusionX screen

limits.source: internet-banking dev seed (scripts/seed-dev-payments.cjs) — mock until bank confirms

programmeScope.nearTerm: Phase 1 completion only unless log notes otherwise

coreCommands.title: Use ThejaD
coreCommands.summary: Install MCP in Cursor, run status, enable hooks — your IDE agent calls ThejaD on every task.
coreCommands.code:
npx thejad init
thejad stats
thejad mcp start

coreCommands.title: thejad_orchestrate
coreCommands.summary: Main orchestra entry: warm models → match role + skills → token-optimized prompt → delivery workflow.

coreCommands.title: mamaThejana
coreCommands.summary: Unlock phrase → 100% tier (all catalog, NotebookLM smokes, full integrations). Lock with "nothejad unlock".
coreCommands.code:
thejad_unlock({ phrase: "mamaThejana" })
# or THEJAD_FULL_ACCESS=1 in MCP env

coreCommands.title: Graphify
coreCommands.summary: Index monorepo as knowledge graph — graphify_hint + graphify catalog domain (15 tools).
coreCommands.code:
graphify_hint({ path: "repo root" })
vendor_sync_skills → graphify-graphify skill

coreCommands.title: limits_check
coreCommands.summary: LOLC dev payment limits + programme phase weights — keeps agents inside Phase 1 scope.
coreCommands.code:
limits_check → lolc-limits.json
scope_guard for AGENTS.md alignment
